previousSessions.summary: Applied all 13 panel review fixes to ACP spec v0.2.0 — 8 consensus (5-0), 5 additional (3+ votes). Committed and pushed.

Fix 13: (description from conversation context)

previousSessions.summary: Integrated trust anchor design into ACP spec v0.2.0, ran 5-agent panel review (2 rounds), identified 13 consensus fixes.
completedWork: 1) Read ecosystem-landscape.md for context. 2) Rewrote Section 2 (platform-first framing, trust chain narrative, overview). 3) Added 3 new fields: publisher_identity (6.3.15), repository_owner_id (6.3.16), sigstore_trust_root (6.3.17). 4) Updated Section 8.1 hashed fields allowlist + Section 8.2 type mappings. 5) Added Section 9.2 steps 6 (source binding) and 7 (publisher_identity check) + TOFU note. 6) Added Sections 11.17-11.19 (residual risks, rollback, TOFU). 7) Fixed Appendix C Forgejo entry. 8) Added Appendix D (OIDC extensions, enterprise Sigstore, sigstore-a2a). 9) Added TV-MH4 test vector (hash verified). 10) Updated CHANGELOG.md. 11) Ran 5-agent adversarial panel review (2 rounds, 48 findings, 13 consensus fixes identified). 12) Updated acp-trust-anchor.md intro.
nextSteps: Implement all 13 panel fixes in acp-spec.md
